text:
Here is an updated HW/Motherboard for the AMD64 listing:

Manufacturer:  HP
Model:  Proliant DL360 G5
Chipset/Socket:  Intel 5000p / Socket LGA771
Tested Freebsd version:  6.1-RELEASE
Notes: functional  - requires bce change of BCE_MAX_SEGMENTS for issue during certain network conditions. 

ubench -c = 1212897 with 2 x Intel 5160 procs
